_schema.description: Single source of truth for the Avana product catalog. Each product knows which pain areas, audiences, and conditions it belongs to via relation arrays. To add a new product: append an entry below, drop the image into images/products/{slug}.jpg, and list the slug under the relevant relation arrays. No code changes needed.

fields.slug: unique kebab-case identifier (also used as image filename)
fields.name: product display name
fields.shortDescription: 1-2 sentence description shown on the card
fields.link: destination URL — typically the osteokart.com product page
fields.relatedPainAreas: array of pain-area slugs (knee, foot, shoulder, elbow, spine, hip)
fields.relatedAudiences: array of audience slugs (knee-joint-pain, back-pain, recovering-from-surgery, surgeon)
fields.relatedConditions: array of condition slugs (osteoarthritis, post-surgery-recovery, cold-therapy, spine-support)

products.name: Freestyle OA
products.shortDescription: An offloader brace clinically designed to reduce pain from medial or lateral knee osteoarthritis by redistributing pressure across the joint.
products.usage: Mild to moderate knee OA, daily wear

products.name: Polar Care Wave
products.shortDescription: Cold therapy with active compression — used post-operatively to control pain and swelling and speed recovery after ACL or knee replacement surgery.

products.name: Knee Stabiliser
products.shortDescription: Functional support for ligament instability and return-to-sport. Adjustable hinges control range of motion during rehabilitation.

products.name: Tennis Elbow Strap
products.shortDescription: Targeted compression strap that relieves pain from lateral epicondylitis by redistributing force away from the inflamed tendon.

products.name: Ankle Stirrup Brace
products.shortDescription: Rigid lateral support for ankle sprain recovery and return-to-sport protection.

products.name: Hip Abduction Brace
products.shortDescription: Post-surgical hip support designed to limit harmful motion and protect the joint after hip replacement or labral surgery.

products.name: Shoulder Immobiliser
products.shortDescription: Post-surgical sling and swathe combination for controlled immobilisation after rotator cuff or shoulder surgery.

products.name: Spinamic Scoliosis Brace
products.shortDescription: A custom-fitted scoliosis brace that has helped patients reduce spinal curvature and avoid surgical intervention.

products.name: Aspen Lumbar LSO
products.shortDescription: Lumbar-sacral orthosis providing high-grade stabilisation for low back pain, post-surgical recovery, and disc-related issues.

products.name: Aspen Cervical Collar
products.shortDescription: Adjustable cervical support for neck strain, post-trauma recovery, and post-surgical immobilisation.
